description: SQL strings in PlaceReadRepository and PersonalizationController had unescaped single quotes when matching status 'COMPLETED', causing PHP syntax errors.
fix: Escaped all SQL status strings to \'COMPLETED\' within single-quoted PHP strings.

description: The api:openapi:export command in the script ran against the pre-compiled development container image, missing our recent HealthOpenApiFactory changes.
fix: Rebuilt the family-places-api:development image locally before exporting and generating client types.
